purpose: Use daily spare API-FOOTBALL Pro requests to maximize historical data collection for model iteration without risking World Cup matchday P0 data.

competitions.notes: 2026 is runtime + archive priority. Older seasons are model/reference backfill only and must be probed for API coverage before detailed collection.
Split-year seasons use API-FOOTBALL starting year convention, e.g. 2025 means 2025-2026.

collection_phases.goal: Verify season coverage and collect fixture ids, scores, dates, teams, venues, referee, and status.
collection_phases.promotion_gate: Can promote fixture index to normalized after ID mapping and season coverage validation.

collection_phases.goal: Collect league tables for model strength priors and season context.
Batch up to 20 fixture ids per request for final fixture detail snapshots.
Collect detailed match stats, events, lineups, and player ratings where coverage supports it.
collection_phases.promotion_gate: Do not promote to normalized/public until field semantics and completeness are validated.

collection_phases.goal: Backfill player season stats, coach details, and injury/sidelined history for model features.
Collect report-only H2H and provider prediction reference for calibration research.

daily_backfill_order: complete current World Cup P0/P1 runtime tasks
consume spare quota on fifa_world_cup historical seasons
repeat next incomplete season/phase until safety floor is reached
